attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT   RANK () OVER (ORDER BY NADT.BK_AR_ADJ_NUMBER,NADT.BK_COMPANY_CODE,NADT.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY,NADT.SS_CODE) + MAX_VAL AR_ADJUSTMENT_KEY,
         NADT.BK_AR_ADJ_NUMBER,
         NADT.BK_COMPANY_CODE,
         NADT.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY,
		 NADT.SS_CODE,
         USER EDW_CREATE_USER ,
   CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) EDW_CREATE_DTM          
FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_ADJUSTMENT_TRX NADT
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_FISCAL_MONTH NFM
ON ( NADT.GL_DATE BETWEEN FISCAL_MONTH_START_DATE AND FISCAL_MONTH_END_DATE) 
INNER   JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX NAT
ON ( NADT.AR_TRX_KEY = NAT.AR_TRX_KEY)
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT NGLA
ON ( NGLA.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY = NADT.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY)
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_SET_OF_BOOKS NSB
 ON ( NSB.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY = NADT.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY)
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EV_OP_UNIT_GAAP_COMPANY EOUGC
 ON (EOUGC.BK_COMPANY_CODE = NADT.BK_COMPANY_CODE
 AND EOUGC.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY = NADT.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY   ) ,
( SELECT COALESCE (MAX (AR_ADJUSTMENT_KEY), 0) MAX_VAL FROM $$TRANSLATIONDB.SM_AR_ADJUSTMENT  ) SFTHMAX
 WHERE NADT.GL_POSTED_DATE          IS NOT NULL
AND NADT.AR_ADJ_TRX_FUNCTIONAL_AMT<>0
AND NADT.AR_TYPE_CD <> 'LINE'
AND NGLA.BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE IN ('11575','11596','11597','11598','11599','11560','11561')
AND NADT.SS_CODE='CG'
AND  NOT EXISTS (
          SELECT 1
            FROM $$TRANSLATIONDB.SM_AR_ADJUSTMENT SMFAT
           WHERE NADT.BK_AR_ADJ_NUMBER = SMFAT.BK_AR_ADJ_NUMBER
             AND NADT.BK_COMPANY_CODE = SMFAT.BK_COMPANY_CODE
    AND NADT.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY=SMFAT.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY
	AND NADT.SS_CODE = SMFAT.SS_CODE
	AND NADT.SS_CODE='CG')

SELECT 
SM.AR_ADJUSTMENT_KEY CM_ADJUSTMENT_KEY,
NSB.FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE		FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE,
NGLA.BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE		BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE,
(CASE WHEN NAT.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY IS NULL  THEN RANDOM(1000000,1001800)*-1 ELSE NAT.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY END ) AS BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,  
NADT.BK_AR_ADJ_NUMBER			BK_AR_TRX_NUM,
COALESCE(NAT.RU_CUST_PURCHASE_ORDER_NUMBER,'UNKNOWN') AS RU_CUST_PURCHASE_ORDER_NUM,	
COALESCE(NADT.AR_TYPE_CD,'UNKNOWN') AS		AR_TYPE_CD,		
COALESCE(NADT.AR_ADJ_TRX_FUNCTIONAL_AMT,0)*-1 AS DV_AR_ADJ_TRX_FUNCTIONAL_AMT,
(CASE WHEN ( COALESCE(NGLA.BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE,0) = '11560' AND NADT.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY = 500 AND NADT.BK_COMPANY_CODE ='020' )
THEN (NADT.AR_ADJ_TRX_FUNCTIONAL_AMT*-1*(COALESCE(PL_CONVERSION_RATE,1) ) ) *-1
ELSE (NADT.AR_ADJ_TRX_FUNCTIONAL_AMT*-1*(COALESCE(PL_CONVERSION_RATE,1) ) )  END )  DV_AR_ADJ_TRX_USD_AMT,
NADT.GL_DATE				GL_DT,                       
NADT.GL_POSTED_DATE			GL_POSTED_DT,
COALESCE(NADT.AR_ADJ_TRX_REASON_CODE,'UNKNOWN') AS 	AR_ADJ_TRX_REASON_CD,
'UNKNOWN'		VENDOR_NAME,
EOUGC.BK_OPERATING_UNIT_NAME_CODE	OPERATING_UNIT_NAME_CD,
'AR_ADJ'				CUST_TRX_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD ,
NFM.BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT*100 + NFM.BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT	FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_NUM_INT,
NADT.BK_COMPANY_CODE,
NADT.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY,
USER AS EDW_CREATE_USER,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) as EDW_CREATE_DATETIME,
USER as EDW_UPDATE_USER,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) as EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME,
'I' AS ACTION_CODE,
'I' AS DML_TYPE
FROM  
$$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_ADJUSTMENT_TRX NADT
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_FISCAL_MONTH NFM
	ON ( NADT.GL_DATE BETWEEN FISCAL_MONTH_START_DATE AND FISCAL_MONTH_END_DATE ) 
INNER   JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX NAT
	ON ( NADT.AR_TRX_KEY = NAT.AR_TRX_KEY) 
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT NGLA
	ON ( NGLA.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY = NADT.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY)
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_SET_OF_BOOKS NSB
	ON ( NSB.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY = NADT.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY) 
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EV_OP_UNIT_GAAP_COMPANY EOUGC
	ON (EOUGC.BK_COMPANY_CODE = NADT.BK_COMPANY_CODE
	AND EOUGC.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY = NADT.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY   )
INNER JOIN $$TRANSLATIONDB.SM_AR_ADJUSTMENT SM
ON 	(NADT.BK_AR_ADJ_NUMBER = SM.BK_AR_ADJ_NUMBER
             AND NADT.BK_COMPANY_CODE = SM.BK_COMPANY_CODE
			 AND NADT.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY=SM.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY
			 AND NADT.SS_CODE=SM.SS_CODE)
			 
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_CURRENCY_CONV_DAILY_RATE  NCCDR
	ON ( NADT.GL_DATE = BK_CONVERSION_DATE
	AND NSB.FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE = BK_FROM_CURRENCY_CODE
	AND BK_TO_CURRENCY_CODE ='USD')
WHERE 
NADT.GL_POSTED_DATE          IS NOT NULL
AND NADT.AR_ADJ_TRX_FUNCTIONAL_AMT<>0
AND BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE IN ('11575','11596','11597','11598','11599','11560','11561')
AND NADT.EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME > ( SELECT LAST_EXTRACT_DATE FROM $$ETLVWDB.DW_JOB_STREAMS
WHERE JOB_STREAM_ID = 'wf_WK_CM_ADJUSTMENT_ARADJ_TRX')
AND NADT.SS_CODE = 'CG'

SELECT   RANK () OVER (ORDER BY NADT.BK_AR_ADJ_NUMBER,NADT.BK_COMPANY_CODE,NADT.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY,NADT.SS_CODE) + MAX_VAL AR_ADJUSTMENT_KEY,
         NADT.BK_AR_ADJ_NUMBER,
         NADT.BK_COMPANY_CODE,
         NADT.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY,
		 NADT.SS_CODE,
         USER EDW_CREATE_USER ,
   CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) EDW_CREATE_DTM          
FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_ADJUSTMENT_TRX NADT
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_FISCAL_MONTH NFM
ON ( NADT.GL_DATE BETWEEN FISCAL_MONTH_START_DATE AND FISCAL_MONTH_END_DATE) 
INNER   JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX NAT
ON ( NADT.AR_TRX_KEY = NAT.AR_TRX_KEY)
/* CDC CODE */
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT NGLA
ON ( NGLA.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY = NADT.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY) 
INNER JOIN     
(
SELECT 
     SEGMENT1,
     SEGMENT2,
     SEGMENT3,
     SEGMENT4,
     SEGMENT5,
     SEGMENT6,
     GLOBAL_NAME
FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_CDC_GL_CODE_COMBINATIONS 
 GROUP BY 1,2,3,4,5,6,7
) ELCDC
  ON (             
                 ELCDC.SEGMENT1=NGLA.BK_COMPANY_CODE
       AND ELCDC.SEGMENT2=NGLA.BK_FINANCIAL_LOCATION_CODE
       AND ELCDC.SEGMENT3=NGLA.BK_DEPARTMENT_CODE
       AND ELCDC.SEGMENT4=NGLA.BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE
       AND ELCDC.SEGMENT5=NGLA.BK_SUBACCOUNT_CODE
       AND ELCDC.SEGMENT6=NGLA.BK_PROJECT_CODE
       )
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
ON ELCDC.GLOBAL_NAME = NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME


INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_SET_OF_BOOKS NSB
 ON ( NSB.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY = NADT.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY)
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EV_OP_UNIT_GAAP_COMPANY EOUGC
 ON (EOUGC.BK_COMPANY_CODE = NADT.BK_COMPANY_CODE
 AND EOUGC.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY = NADT.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY   ) ,
( SELECT COALESCE (MAX (AR_ADJUSTMENT_KEY), 0) MAX_VAL         FROM $$TRANSLATIONDB.SM_AR_ADJUSTMENT     ) SFTHMAX
 WHERE NADT.GL_POSTED_DATE IS NOT NULL
AND NADT.AR_ADJ_TRX_FUNCTIONAL_AMT<>0
AND NADT.AR_TYPE_CD <> 'LINE'
AND ELCDC.SEGMENT4 IN ('11575','11596','11597','11598','11599','11560','11561')
AND NADT.SS_CODE='CDC'
AND  NOT EXISTS (
          SELECT 1
            FROM $$TRANSLATIONDB.SM_AR_ADJUSTMENT SMFAT
           WHERE NADT.BK_AR_ADJ_NUMBER = SMFAT.BK_AR_ADJ_NUMBER
             AND NADT.BK_COMPANY_CODE = SMFAT.BK_COMPANY_CODE
    AND NADT.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY=SMFAT.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY
	AND NADT.SS_CODE = SMFAT.SS_CODE
	AND NADT.SS_CODE='CDC')

SELECT 
SM.AR_ADJUSTMENT_KEY CM_ADJUSTMENT_KEY,
NSB.FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE		FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE,
ELCDC.SEGMENT4		BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE,
(CASE WHEN NAT.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY IS NULL  THEN RANDOM(1000000,1001800)*-1 ELSE NAT.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY END ) AS BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,  
NADT.BK_AR_ADJ_NUMBER			BK_AR_TRX_NUM,
COALESCE(NAT.RU_CUST_PURCHASE_ORDER_NUMBER,'UNKNOWN') AS RU_CUST_PURCHASE_ORDER_NUM,	
COALESCE(NADT.AR_TYPE_CD,'UNKNOWN') AS		AR_TYPE_CD,		
COALESCE(NADT.AR_ADJ_TRX_FUNCTIONAL_AMT,0)*-1 AS DV_AR_ADJ_TRX_FUNCTIONAL_AMT,
(CASE WHEN ( COALESCE(BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE,0) = '11560' AND NADT.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY = 500 AND NADT.BK_COMPANY_CODE ='020' )
THEN (NADT.AR_ADJ_TRX_FUNCTIONAL_AMT*-1*(COALESCE(PL_CONVERSION_RATE,1) ) ) *-1
ELSE (NADT.AR_ADJ_TRX_FUNCTIONAL_AMT*-1*(COALESCE(PL_CONVERSION_RATE,1) ) )  END )  DV_AR_ADJ_TRX_USD_AMT,
NADT.GL_DATE				GL_DT,                       
NADT.GL_POSTED_DATE			GL_POSTED_DT,
COALESCE(NADT.AR_ADJ_TRX_REASON_CODE,'UNKNOWN') AS 	AR_ADJ_TRX_REASON_CD,
'UNKNOWN'		VENDOR_NAME,
EOUGC.BK_OPERATING_UNIT_NAME_CODE	OPERATING_UNIT_NAME_CD,
'AR_ADJ'				CUST_TRX_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD ,
NFM.BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT*100 + NFM.BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT	FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_NUM_INT,
NADT.BK_COMPANY_CODE,
NADT.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY,
USER AS EDW_CREATE_USER,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) as EDW_CREATE_DATETIME,
USER as EDW_UPDATE_USER,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) as EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME,
'I' AS ACTION_CODE,
'I' AS DML_TYPE
FROM  
$$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_ADJUSTMENT_TRX NADT
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_FISCAL_MONTH NFM
	ON ( NADT.GL_DATE BETWEEN FISCAL_MONTH_START_DATE AND FISCAL_MONTH_END_DATE ) 
INNER   JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX NAT
	ON ( NADT.AR_TRX_KEY = NAT.AR_TRX_KEY) 
/*INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT NGLA
	ON ( NGLA.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY = NADT.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY)*/

LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT NGLA
ON ( NGLA.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY = NADT.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY) 

INNER JOIN     
(
SELECT 
     SEGMENT1,
     SEGMENT2,
     SEGMENT3,
     SEGMENT4,
     SEGMENT5,
     SEGMENT6,
     GLOBAL_NAME
FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_CDC_GL_CODE_COMBINATIONS 
 GROUP BY 1,2,3,4,5,6,7
) ELCDC
  ON (             
                 ELCDC.SEGMENT1=NGLA.BK_COMPANY_CODE
       AND ELCDC.SEGMENT2=NGLA.BK_FINANCIAL_LOCATION_CODE
       AND ELCDC.SEGMENT3=NGLA.BK_DEPARTMENT_CODE
       AND ELCDC.SEGMENT4=NGLA.BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE
       AND ELCDC.SEGMENT5=NGLA.BK_SUBACCOUNT_CODE
       AND ELCDC.SEGMENT6=NGLA.BK_PROJECT_CODE
       )
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
ON ELCDC.GLOBAL_NAME = NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_SET_OF_BOOKS NSB
	ON ( NSB.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY = NADT.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY) 
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EV_OP_UNIT_GAAP_COMPANY EOUGC
	ON (EOUGC.BK_COMPANY_CODE = NADT.BK_COMPANY_CODE
	AND EOUGC.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY = NADT.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY   )
INNER JOIN $$TRANSLATIONDB.SM_AR_ADJUSTMENT SM
ON 	(NADT.BK_AR_ADJ_NUMBER = SM.BK_AR_ADJ_NUMBER
             AND NADT.BK_COMPANY_CODE = SM.BK_COMPANY_CODE
			 AND NADT.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY=SM.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY
			 AND NADT.SS_CODE=SM.SS_CODE)
			 
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_CURRENCY_CONV_DAILY_RATE  NCCDR
	ON ( NADT.GL_DATE = BK_CONVERSION_DATE
	AND NSB.FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE = BK_FROM_CURRENCY_CODE
	AND BK_TO_CURRENCY_CODE ='USD')
WHERE 
NADT.GL_POSTED_DATE   IS NOT NULL
AND NADT.AR_ADJ_TRX_FUNCTIONAL_AMT<>0
AND BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE IN ('11575','11596','11597','11598','11599','11560','11561')
AND NADT.EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME > ( SELECT LAST_EXTRACT_DATE FROM $$ETLVWDB.DW_JOB_STREAMS
WHERE JOB_STREAM_ID = 'wf_WK_CM_ADJUSTMENT_ARADJ_TRX')
AND NADT.SS_CODE = 'CDC'
